description: Moccasin style flat shoes in a greyish beige colour from catwalk. A very feminine shape and cute ruffles make these shoes a must-have for the woman who wants to dress up with style every day. These versatile shoes will go with everything & ndash smart enough to wear to the office and cute enough to wear on a night out. Upper Suede upper with slip-on shape Synthetic leather lining and padded sockliner for instep comfort Fabric gathered into ruffles at the toe box for moccasin style Strap for style and comfort across the tongue Outsole Non-slip TPU outsole with grooves for grip shoe care Wipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust and dirt Do not wash or store in direct sunlight
